items.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in mega US share sale
items.dek: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.
items.body: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Twelve die in wildfire in Spain as heatwave continues in southern Europe
items.dek: Six people were injured in the blaze in Los Gallardos in the province of Almería.
items.body: Six people were injured in the blaze in Los Gallardos in the province of Almería.
